positive: A highly stylized, geometric mountain range silhouette at sunset, rendered in deep indigo and burnt orange tones. The foreground features clean, minimalist abstract flora shapes and geometric water reflections. The composition is symmetrical and central, designed for a bold apparel print. Use strong contrast between the dark silhouettes and the gradient sky. Clean lines, vector art aesthetic, abstract brutalism, high resolution, flat illustration style, graphic design, print-ready.
